original_image_tags: Pinkish paper document, appears to be the back of a carbon copy or routing slip. Two hole-punch marks are visible at the top edge. Faint reversed text from the front of the page bleeds through in the center. The paper shows age discoloration and minor foxing.

elements.description: The back of a pinkish paper page showing two hole-punches at the top. Faint, inverted ink stamps are visible, including a line of text, the word 'ROUTING', and a block at the bottom containing inverted text such as 'U.S.A.F.', 'MILITARY AIR TRANSPORT SERVICE', and a date stamp 'MAR 26 12 PM 1949'.

judge.reason: Description B claims specific verbatim text ('ROUTING', 'U.S.A.F.', 'MILITARY AIR TRANSPORT SERVICE', 'MAR 26 12 PM 1949') inside stamps or images that Description A does not see at all, reading only faint reversed text bleeds.
